scripts.clean: node --input-type=module -e "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist', { force: true, recursive: true });"
scripts.build: node --input-type=module -e "import { cpSync, rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist', { force: true, recursive: true }); cpSync('public', 'dist', { recursive: true });"
